parameters.text: ={{ $('Compute due step').first().json.message.replace('{TIME}', DateTime.fromISO($('Compute due step').first().json.starts_at, { zone: 'utc' }).setZone($json.timezone || 'UTC').toFormat('ccc d LLL, HH:mm (ZZZZ)')) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "from": "Maria <maria@send.itscontentflow.com>", "to": [{{ JSON.stringify($json.email) }}], "subject": {{ JSON.stringify($('Compute due step').first().json.emailSubject.replace('{TIME}', DateTime.fromISO($('Compute due step').first().json.starts_at, { zone: 'utc' }).setZone($json.timezone || 'UTC').toFormat('ccc d LLL, HH:mm (ZZZZ)'))) }}, "html": {{ JSON.stringify($('Compute due step').first().json.emailHtml.replace('{NAME}', $json.first_name || 'there').replace('{TIME}', DateTime.fromISO($('Compute due step').first().json.starts_at, { zone: 'utc' }).setZone($json.timezone || 'UTC').toFormat('ccc d LLL, HH:mm (ZZZZ)'))) }}, "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Compute due step').first().json.emailText.replace('{NAME}', $json.first_name || 'there').replace('{TIME}', DateTime.fromISO($('Compute due step').first().json.starts_at, { zone: 'utc' }).setZone($json.timezone || 'UTC').toFormat('ccc d LLL, HH:mm (ZZZZ)'))) }} }
